findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 15 findings from 7 agents into 4 unique findings. Removed 11 duplicates. Identified 2 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Define Notification Prioritization Criteria (score=2.444); Missing Data Handling Justification (score=2.205); Missing data: No tickets or work items provided (score=2.185); Accessibility Compliance Gaps (score=2.018)

top_priorities.title: Missing data: No tickets or work items provided

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 2 conflicts between agent findings. intake-001 vs risk-001: Missing data from input bundle may lead to non-compliance with data handling policies due to lack of justification for data collection.; requirements-001 vs risk-005: Defining notification prioritization criteria using machine learning may lead to accessibility issues if not designed with WCAG AA standards in mind.

evidence.excerpt: Missing data from input bundle may lead to non-compliance with data handling policies due to lack of justification for data collection.
Defining notification prioritization criteria using machine learning may lead to accessibility issues if not designed with WCAG AA standards in mind.

conflicts.description: Missing data from input bundle may lead to non-compliance with data handling policies due to lack of justification for data collection.
conflicts.resolution: Ensure that all data collection is justified and documented before proceeding with the intake process.
conflicts.reasoning: Compliance with data handling policies is critical; therefore, data collection must be validated to avoid legal repercussions.

conflicts.description: Defining notification prioritization criteria using machine learning may lead to accessibility issues if not designed with WCAG AA standards in mind.
conflicts.resolution: Incorporate accessibility considerations into the machine learning model development process to ensure compliance with WCAG AA standards.
conflicts.reasoning: Prioritization criteria must be inclusive to avoid hindering access for users with disabilities while still achieving the intended functionality.

summary: Consolidated 15 findings into 4 unique items. Removed 11 duplicates, resolved 2 conflicts. Top priority: Define Notification Prioritization Criteria.
